Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Winged Defender Orb

Once in a while, launches a magic orb at a random enemy. On hit, the orb explodes and deals magic damage to the target and all units in a small radius around it equal to 110% of the orb owner's spell power. Also, all affected units are frozen for 3 sec. While frozen, the units are unable to move or attack for 3 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target' gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 3 sec. Also, all enemies in a large radius around the main target have their damage and attack speed reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
